text:
Junior Planning
NYU Shanghai students typically would choose to study away in their third year. By this time, students are quite clear about their academic interests and goals. Students are expected to develop cross-cultural competencies, broadened perspectives for independent research, increased networks for mentorship, and etc.
Academics
Course Recommendations: Students are recommended to take major advanced or electives courses in their third year. When studying away, you might consider exploring a New York Cross School minor.
If you run into any issues with global courses registration, you may refer to the registration guidance page FAQ section (Global Courses Registration Frequent Asked Questions).
Events & Opportunities
Major Exploration
Study Away
Global Awards
Resources
Global Course Evaluation
Global Courses Satisfying Shanghai Degree Requirements
Office of Global Programs
Global Notebook
Global Awards
Graduate School Blast

text_blocks.text: NYU Shanghai students typically would choose to study away in their third year. By this time, students are quite clear about their academic interests and goals. Students are expected to develop cross-cultural competencies, broadened perspectives for independent research, increased networks for mentorship, and etc.
Course Recommendations: Students are recommended to take major advanced or electives courses in their third year. When studying away, you might consider exploring a New York Cross School minor.
If you run into any issues with global courses registration, you may refer to the registration guidance page FAQ section (Global Courses Registration Frequent Asked Questions).
